entity.summary: Active centralized cryptocurrency exchange brand launched on September 15, 2015 through BTCChina's rebrand to BTCC, with current official materials describing United Kingdom headquarters.
entity.notes: HEI models BTCChina and BTCC as separate lineage-linked brands. BTCChina retains the 2011 history and ends at the 2015-09-15 rebrand; BTCC begins on that date. United Kingdom reflects current official headquarters wording, not every regional provider's incorporation.

events.title: BTCC brand launched through BTCChina rebrand
events.description: BTCChina launched the BTCC brand and btcc.com identity on September 15, 2015 as part of a shift toward a global audience.
events.notes: This is the BTCC brand start; predecessor BTCChina retains the 2011 founding history.

events.title: BTCC announced acquisition by a Hong Kong investment fund
events.description: BTCC announced that its business had been acquired by a Hong Kong-based blockchain investment fund whose identity was not publicly disclosed in the reviewed reports.
events.counterparty_name: Undisclosed Hong Kong-based blockchain investment fund
events.notes: The acquisition changed ownership but did not end the BTCC brand or exchange service.

evidence.title: BTCC official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies current BTCC identity and active service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BTCC
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates BTCC exchange identity.

evidence.title: BTCC official company profile
evidence.notes: Official profile supports current identity and operating history; headquarters wording applies to this active BTCC record.

evidence.title: BTCChina Rebrands as BTCC with Focus on Global Audience
evidence.notes: BTCC-issued release records the BTCChina-to-BTCC rebrand on September 15, 2015.

evidence.title: BTCC acquired by Hong Kong-based blockchain investment fund
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report records BTCC's acquisition announcement and the undisclosed fund description.

evidence.title: Bitcoin Exchange BTCC Just Got Acquired
evidence.notes: Independent contemporaneous report corroborates the acquisition and the absence of a disclosed buyer identity.
